violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Roasted corn and homemade pubwheat and ranch dressings were observed held past 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
